assertions.description: All 11 components (R1-R4, C1-C2, D1-D2, Q1-Q2, J1) are present with correct references, values, and footprints. The 8 nets are correctly reconstructed from the wire graph. Transistor circuits are correctly identified: Q1 and Q2 are NPN BJT switches with LED collector loads and 100K base resistors. RC timing networks R3/C1 (tau=1.0s) and R2/C2 (tau=1.0s) are detected.
